sleepTargets.label: Nap
sleepTargets.notes: Aim for a settled midday nap before overtiredness builds.

sleepTargets.label: Wake windows
sleepTargets.notes: A steady midday nap usually protects both wake windows.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: Move bedtime earlier after daycare or a short nap.

feedTargets.label: Breakfast
feedTargets.notes: Start the day with breakfast and milk if that is still part of your routine.

feedTargets.label: Lunch
feedTargets.notes: Keep lunch predictable before the nap.

feedTargets.label: Snack
feedTargets.notes: A simple snack helps the afternoon stay smooth.

feedTargets.label: Dinner + bedtime milk
feedTargets.notes: Keep dinner and the bedtime routine calm and repeatable.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
